channel.title: Logs on smirking teapot
channel.description: Recent content in Logs on smirking teapot

item.title: std::unreachable in C++23
item.description: C++23 introduced std::unreachable() (defined in <utility>) to explicitly mark code paths that should never execute. Before this, we relied on compiler-specific builtins like __builtin_unreachable() (GCC/Clang) or __assume(false) (MSVC).
